Let me analyze this logistics platform reporting problem and design a CQRS solution.

Key facts:
- 50M records, highly normalized (12 tables, complex joins)
- Read queries: 30-60 seconds for dashboard (orders by status, delivery success rates, avg transit time by zone, courier performance)
- Read-only queries
- Write volume: ~500 orders/day (very low)
- Team considering CQRS

This is a textbook case for CQRS. Let me design the full solution.
